label: Stress Test C — 3-Level Nesting + German GmbH + Irrevocable Trust
description: Complex UBO resolution: Delaware LLC with three-level ownership nesting including a German GmbH, a Delaware LP with a corporate general partner, and a California irrevocable trust. Multiple foreign nationals. No adverse media. Stress-tests deep graph traversal and multiple entity types.

documents.label: Summit Industrial Holdings LLC Articles of Organization

pages.text:
CERTIFICATE OF FORMATION
SUMMIT INDUSTRIAL HOLDINGS LLC
State of Delaware

First: The name of the limited liability company is Summit Industrial Holdings LLC.
Second: Registered office: 251 Little Falls Drive, Wilmington, Delaware 19808.
Third: Registered Agent: Corporation Service Company.

Date of Formation: April 7, 2018.
Purpose: Industrial real estate investment and asset management.

OWNERSHIP STRUCTURE AS OF DATE OF FORMATION

The Company is owned by the following members:
(1) Alpine Peak Capital LLC, a Wyoming limited liability company: fifty percent (50%) membership interest.
(2) Coastal Development Partners LP, a Delaware limited partnership: twenty-five percent (25%) membership interest.
(3) Mitchell Family Irrevocable Trust (California), with Sarah Jane Mitchell as Trustee: twenty-five percent (25%) membership interest.

Total: one hundred percent (100%).

Management: The Company is managed by its members in proportion to membership interests.

PRINCIPAL BUSINESS ACTIVITIES

Summit Industrial Holdings LLC is engaged in the acquisition, development, and management of industrial real estate properties throughout the Western United States. The Company's portfolio includes distribution centers, light manufacturing facilities, and flex industrial spaces. Primary revenue sources: rental income from long-term commercial leases.

documents.label: Alpine Peak Capital LLC Operating Agreement

pages.text:
OPERATING AGREEMENT OF ALPINE PEAK CAPITAL LLC
A Wyoming Limited Liability Company

This Agreement is effective January 15, 2018. Alpine Peak Capital LLC is organized under the Wyoming Limited Liability Company Act with its principal office at 1720 Big Horn Avenue, Suite 100, Cody, Wyoming 82414.

ARTICLE II — MEMBERSHIP INTERESTS

Section 2.1 — Members. The Company has two members:

(a) Bergmann Verwaltungs GmbH, a Gesellschaft mit beschränkter Haftung (limited liability company) organized under the laws of the Federal Republic of Germany, registered in the Commercial Register of the Frankfurt am Main District Court under HRB 52847, with registered office at Bockenheimer Landstrasse 24, 60323 Frankfurt am Main, Germany: sixty percent (60%) membership interest.

(b) Sarah Jane Mitchell, a citizen of the United States of America, residing at 1847 Mulholland Drive, Los Angeles, California 90046: forty percent (40%) membership interest.

ARTICLE III — MANAGEMENT

Section 3.1 — Co-Management. The Company is managed by both members. Major decisions require approval of members holding 75% or more of the membership interests. Day-to-day operations may be delegated to Sarah Jane Mitchell as designated Managing Member for U.S. operations.

Section 3.2 — Distributions. Distributions are made quarterly in proportion to membership interest percentages.

pages.text:
HANDELSREGISTERAUSZUG (COMMERCIAL REGISTER EXTRACT)
Amtsgericht Frankfurt am Main — HRB 52847

Firma (Company Name): Bergmann Verwaltungs GmbH
Sitz (Registered Office): Frankfurt am Main
Geschäftsanschrift (Business Address): Bockenheimer Landstrasse 24, 60323 Frankfurt am Main
Gegenstand (Business Object): Verwaltung eigener Vermögenswerte und Beteiligungen (Management of own assets and investments)

Gründungsdatum (Date of Incorporation): 15. März 2005
Stammkapital (Share Capital): EUR 25,000

GESELLSCHAFTER (SHAREHOLDERS)

Einziger Gesellschafter (Sole Shareholder):
Name: Klaus Heinrich Bergmann
Geburtsdatum (Date of Birth): 22. September 1968
Wohnort (Place of Residence): Sachsenhausen, Frankfurt am Main, Federal Republic of Germany
Nationalität (Nationality): German

Geschäftsanteil (Share): EUR 25,000 — representing one hundred percent (100%) of the share capital of Bergmann Verwaltungs GmbH.

Geschäftsführer (Managing Director): Klaus Heinrich Bergmann

GESCHÄFTSFÜHRER UND VERTRETUNG (MANAGEMENT AND REPRESENTATION)

Klaus Heinrich Bergmann is the sole managing director (Geschäftsführer) of Bergmann Verwaltungs GmbH and is authorized to represent the Company individually in all matters.

The Company holds a sixty percent (60%) membership interest in Alpine Peak Capital LLC, a Wyoming limited liability company, as part of its international investment portfolio.

documents.label: Coastal Development Partners LP Limited Partnership Agreement

pages.text:
LIMITED PARTNERSHIP AGREEMENT
COASTAL DEVELOPMENT PARTNERS LP
A Delaware Limited Partnership

This Agreement is made effective March 1, 2017. Coastal Development Partners LP is organized as a Delaware limited partnership pursuant to the Delaware Revised Uniform Limited Partnership Act.

General Partner: Coastal Dev Management LLC, a Delaware limited liability company.
Principal Office: 8900 Civic Center Drive, Suite 200, San Diego, California 92123.

PARTNERSHIP INTERESTS

General Partner Interest:
Coastal Dev Management LLC (General Partner): one percent (1%) general partnership interest. The General Partner has sole and exclusive authority to manage and control the business and affairs of the Partnership.

Limited Partnership Interests:
David Jae-Won Park, a citizen of the United States, residing at 4521 Ocean View Boulevard, San Diego, California 92109: seventy-nine and two-tenths percent (79.2%) limited partnership interest.

Yuki Tanaka, a citizen of Japan, residing at 2-14-8 Minami-Aoyama, Minato-ku, Tokyo 107-0062, Japan: nineteen and eight-tenths percent (19.8%) limited partnership interest.

Total: 1% + 79.2% + 19.8% = 100%.

documents.label: Coastal Dev Management LLC Articles of Organization

pages.text:
CERTIFICATE OF FORMATION — COASTAL DEV MANAGEMENT LLC
State of Delaware

Coastal Dev Management LLC is organized as a Delaware limited liability company.
Sole Member and Manager: David Jae-Won Park, citizen of the United States, residing at 4521 Ocean View Boulevard, San Diego, California 92109.
David Jae-Won Park holds one hundred percent (100%) of the membership interests in Coastal Dev Management LLC and serves as its sole Manager.
Date of Formation: February 10, 2017.

MITCHELL FAMILY IRREVOCABLE TRUST

This Irrevocable Trust Agreement is made on October 12, 2016 by SARAH JANE MITCHELL, residing at 1847 Mulholland Drive, Los Angeles, California 90046, as Settlor, and SARAH JANE MITCHELL as initial Trustee.

ARTICLE 1 — CREATION OF IRREVOCABLE TRUST
This Trust is irrevocable and may not be revoked, amended, or modified without court approval. The Settlor has relinquished all beneficial ownership in the Trust assets.

ARTICLE 2 — TRUSTEE POWERS

Trustee: Sarah Jane Mitchell.
The Trustee has full power and authority to manage, invest, and dispose of all Trust assets, including a twenty-five percent (25%) membership interest in Summit Industrial Holdings LLC, a Delaware limited liability company.
The Trustee may exercise all voting and consent rights associated with the Trust's membership interest in Summit Industrial Holdings LLC.

ARTICLE 3 — BENEFICIARIES
Beneficiaries: The living children of Sarah Jane Mitchell.
